hero_description: Experience the future of asset management with our AI-driven robo-advisory system. Real-time analysis, automated rebalancing, and personalized growth strategies.
features_subtitle: Powered by cutting-edge AI, our platform delivers institutional-grade investment strategies to everyone.
feature_risk_profiling_desc: Our advanced algorithms analyze your financial profile to construct personalized risk-adjusted portfolios.
feature_market_data_desc: Stay ahead with streaming data feeds and instant market analysis, ensuring you never miss an opportunity.
feature_auto_rebalancing_desc: Continuous portfolio monitoring and automatic adjustments to maintain your optimal asset allocation.
quote_buffett: The stock market is designed to transfer money from the active to the patient.
quote_einstein: Compound interest is the eighth wonder of the world. He who understands it, earns it.
login_subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your portfolio.
signup_subtitle: Start your journey to financial freedom today.
risk_subtitle: Help our AI understand your financial goals and tolerance.
profile_subtitle: Based on your answers, here represents our AI-driven recommendation.
recommendation_desc: We suggest rebalancing your portfolio to match this allocation for optimal returns adjusted for your risk tolerance.
risk_q1: What is your primary goal for this investment?
risk_q2: How long do you plan to keep this money invested?
risk_q3: What would you do if the market drops by 20% in a month?
risk_q4: What is your current source of income?
profile_conservative_desc: You prioritize safety over returns. Better suited for bonds and stable funds.
profile_balanced_desc: You seek a middle ground between risk and growth. A healthy mix of equity and debt.
profile_aggressive_desc: You want maximum growth and can handle market volatility. High equity exposure.
manage_your_account_and_preferences: Manage your account settings and preferences.
customize_how_cresta_looks_on_your_devic: Customize how Cresta looks on your device.
select_language: Select your preferred language for the interface.
about_mission_desc: To democratize sophisticated wealth management by putting the power of institutional-grade AI into the hands of every investor.
about_vision_desc: To build a world where financial freedom is accessible to all, powered by transparent, data-driven intelligence.
about_team_desc: Built by a team of finance veterans and AI researchers dedicated to revolutionizing the Indian investment landscape.
ai_needs_understand: Our AI needs to understand your financial personality to craft the perfect portfolio. Complete your 2-minute risk assessment to unlock personalized insights and recommendations.
realtime_analysis_desc: We analyze market sentiment and volatility specifically for the Indian market.
custom_ai_models_desc: Our LSTM and Random Forest models provide personalized investment insights.
risk_assessment_old: Your risk assessment is over 6 months old. Market conditions change — let's make sure your strategy still fits.
complete_risk_for_ai: Complete your Risk Assessment to receive AI stock suggestions.
based_on_risk_profile: Based on your {{riskProfile}} risk profile and our analysis of current market trends,
no_holdings_yet: No holdings yet. Add your first stock using the + button above!
stock_not_found: Stock not found. Try with NSE symbol (e.g., RELIANCE, TCS)
unable_load_chart: Unable to load chart data. Please try again.
forecast_disclaimer: Forecasts are based on recent market trends. Not financial advice.
markets_subtitle: Live market data and personalized insights.
sign_in_unlock: Sign in to unlock AI-powered stock suggestions and real-time insights.
backend_not_running: Make sure the backend is running.
no_news_available: No news available at the moment.
whats_happening_today: Here's what's happening with your portfolio today.
based_on_risk_suffix: risk profile and our analysis of current market trends,
signup_success: Account created successfully! Welcome to Cresta.
risk_profile_desc: Your current strategy is optimized for a {{profile}} risk tolerance.
manage_notifications: Choose how you want to be notified about market changes and AI insights.
security_subtitle: Manage your password and account protection settings.
